experience.description:
• Maintained and developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure internal workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Engaged in system design and architecture discussions, contributing to scalable service patterns and effective data modeling.
• Developed React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, enhancing visibility into backend data workflows and operational metrics.
• Improved Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.

projects.description:
• Created an ML data pipeline for real-time sentiment analysis, processing over 1,000 Reddit finance posts per run through a multi-stage ETL process.
• Employed NLP models (FinBERT) and feature engineering to generate over 40 predictive features per ticker, training XGBoost models with 55–70% ROC-AUC.
• Built modular components for data ingestion and transformation, supporting message-driven architectures.
• Streamlined workflows for data collection, preprocessing, and model inference, facilitating real-time analytics.
